name: trace
description_fr: Quand ce Pokémon entre au combat, il copie un talent adverse aléatoire.  Ce talent ne peut pas copier Don Floral, Météo, Illusion, Imposteur, Multi-Type, Calque, Garde Mystik, ou Mode Transe.
description_en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it copies a random opponent's ability.  This ability cannot copy Flower Gift, Forecast, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Trace, Wonder Guard, or Zen Mode.
